name: rolekit
author: Taako
description: Community role packs and optional activity leveling. Creates zodiac, color, pronoun, notification, platform, region, interest, and milestone roles; awards cooldown-limited message XP, rank cards, leaderboards, and automatic level rewards.
install_msg: RoleKit loaded. Use `[p]rolepack list`, `[p]leveling`, `[p]rank`, or the Red-Web-Dashboard page to get started. Leveling is disabled by default.
short: Community role packs, activity XP, ranks, leaderboards, and level rewards.
end_user_data_statement: When leveling is enabled, this cog stores each member's per-server XP total and counted-message total. It does not store message content, and member data is deleted when the member leaves or through Red's data-deletion API.
